questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司每周 7 天、每天 24 小时在 AWS 上运行不间断的 Amazon EC2 工作负载。该公司将需要相同的实例系列和实例类型来运行接下来 12 个月的工作负载。公司应该选择哪种采购选项组合来最大程度地优化成本？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company runs an uninterruptible Amazon EC2 workload on AWS 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The company will require the same instance family and instance type to run the workload for the next 12 months. Which combination of purchasing options should the company choose to MOST optimize costs? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 标准预留实例
A.en: Standard Reserved Instance

B.zh: 可转换预留实例
B.en: Convertible Reserved Instance

C.zh: 计算节省计划
C.en: Compute Savings Plan

D.zh: 竞价实例
D.en: Spot Instance

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：标准预留实例适用于长期稳定的工作负载，可大幅节省成本，特别是当工作负载需要固定实例类型和实例系列时。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Standard Reserved Instance is suitable for long-term stable workloads and provides significant cost savings, especially when the workload requires a fixed instance type and instance family.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽管可转换预留实例允许实例类型和系列之间的转换，但其折扣通常低于标准预留实例。问题明确指出需要固定的实例类型和系列，因此不需要 Convertible 的弹性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Convertible Reserved Instance allows conversion between instance types and families, it generally comes at a lower discount than Standard Reserved Instance. The question clearly states that fixed instance types and families are required, so the flexibility of Convertible is not required.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：计算节省计划提供弹性，允许跨实例类型和系列使用，但折扣通常低于标准预留实例。这个问题显然需要固定的实例类型和系列，因此 Compute Savings Plan 不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Compute Savings Plan offers flexibility, allowing usage across instance types and families, but the discounts are typically lower than Standard Reserved Instances. The question clearly requires a fixed instance type and family, so Compute Savings Plan is not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：竞价型实例价格便宜，但不适合需要 24/7 运行且无法中断的工作负载，因为 竞价型实例可以随时中断。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Spot Instance is inexpensive, but is not suitable for workloads that need to run 24/7 and cannot be interrupted, because Spot Instances can be interrupted at any time.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：选择全预付方式可以进一步降低预留实例的成本，是优化成本的最佳实践之一。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Choosing the All Upfront payment method can further reduce the cost of Reserved Instance and is one of the best practices for optimizing costs.

answer_text.zh: A. 标准预留实例；E. 全部预付款
answer_text.en: A. Standard Reserved Instance; E. All Upfront payment

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：标准预留实例适用于长期稳定的工作负载，可大幅节省成本，特别是当工作负载需要固定实例类型和实例系列时。；选择全预付方式可以进一步降低预留实例的成本，是优化成本的最佳实践之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Standard Reserved Instance is suitable for long-term stable workloads and provides significant cost savings, especially when the workload requires a fixed instance type and instance family.; Choosing the All Upfront payment method can further reduce the cost of Reserved Instance and is one of the best practices for optimizing costs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望运行其应用程序的代码，而无需配置和管理服务器。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run its application's code without having to provision and manage servers. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Glue
A.en: AWS Glue

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
C.en: AWS CodeDeploy

D.zh: Amazon CodeGuru
D.en: Amazon CodeGuru

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Glue 是一项完全托管的 ETL（提取、转换、加载）服务，主要用于数据处理和转换，而不是运行应用代码。该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a fully managed ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) service designed primarily for data processing and transformation rather than running application code. This option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，允许用户在不管理底层服务器的情况下运行代码。该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a serverless computing service that allows users to run code without managing the underlying servers. This option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodeDeploy 是一种部署服务，可自动运行应用程序的部署过程，但它不运行代码。该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a deployment service that automates the deployment process of applications, but it does not run code. This option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CodeGuru 是一款代码分析工具，可以帮助开发者在不运行代码的情况下优化代码品质和性能。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a code analysis tool that helps developers optimize code quality and performance without running the code. This option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，允许用户在不管理底层服务器的情况下运行代码。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a serverless computing service that allows users to run code without managing the underlying servers. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正计划迁移到 AWS 云。公司需要了解现有的本地使用情况和配置。该公司目前还不想将其工作负载复制到 AWS。哪种 AWS 服务或工具可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to understand the existing on-premises usage and configuration. The company does not want to replicate its workloads to AWS, yet. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Application Discovery Service
A.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

B.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
B.en: AWS Application Migration Service

C.zh: 云迁移工厂
C.en: Cloud Migration Factory

D.zh: AWS Transfer Family
D.en: AWS Transfer Family

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务旨在帮助客户发现和分析其现有的本地环境，包括服务器配置、使用情况和依赖项。它是迁移前评估的关键工具。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is designed to help customers discover and analyze their existing on-premises environment, including server configuration, usage and dependencies. It is a key tool for pre-migration assessment.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务用于将本地应用程序迁移到AWS，但标题明确指出该公司不希望立即迁移工作负载。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to migrate on-premises applications to AWS, but the title clearly states that the company does not want to migrate the workload immediately.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 没有名为「Cloud Migration Factory」的服务，这可能是虚构或误导的因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS does not have a service named "Cloud Migration Factory", this may be a fictitious or misleading option.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Transfer Family用于安全地将文件传输至 AWS，但与评估您的本地环境无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to securely transfer files to AWS, but is not relevant for evaluating your local environment.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务旨在帮助客户发现和分析其现有的本地环境，包括服务器配置、使用情况和依赖项。它是迁移前评估的关键工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is designed to help customers discover and analyze their existing on-premises environment, including server configuration, usage and dependencies. It is a key tool for pre-migration assessment.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望允许员工在家远程工作。员工使用 Windows 或 Linux 桌面，并需要通过任何受支持的设备随时随地访问。哪项 AWS 服务可以满足要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to allow its employees to work remotely from home. The company's employees use Windows or Linux desktops. The company's employees need access from anywhere and at anytime by using any supported devices. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon WorkSpaces
A.en: Amazon Workspaces

B.zh: Amazon AppStream 2.0
B.en: Amazon AppStream 2.0

C.zh: Amazon Keyspaces（适用于 Apache Cassandra）
C.en: Amazon Keyspaces (for Apache Cassandra)

D.zh: AWS Cloud9
D.en: AWS Cloud9

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon WorkSpaces 是完全托管的虚拟桌面服务，支持 Windows 和 Linux 桌面，用户可通过受支持的设备随时随地远程访问桌面环境。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a managed virtual staging service that allows users to remotely access their staging environment from any supported device. It supports Windows and Linux operating systems, making it ideal for employees' remote working needs. Therefore, this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon AppStream 2.0 是应用程序流式传输服务，主要提供对特定应用程序的访问，而不是完整的持久虚拟桌面环境。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an application streaming service designed primarily to provide access to specific applications rather than a complete staging environment. Therefore, it does not fully meet the requirements of "remote access checkout" in the question, and this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Keyspaces 是兼容 Apache Cassandra 的托管数据库服务，与远程桌面访问无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Keyspaces is a managed Apache Cassandra database service that has nothing to do with remote checkout or application access. Therefore, this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Cloud9 是基于云的集成开发环境，不用于向员工提供 Windows 或 Linux 虚拟桌面。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a cloud-based input development environment (IDE) primarily used for programming and development work, rather than providing remote checkout access. Therefore, this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon WorkSpaces 是完全托管的虚拟桌面服务，支持 Windows 和 Linux 桌面，用户可通过受支持的设备随时随地远程访问桌面环境。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a managed virtual staging service that allows users to remotely access their staging environment from any supported device. It supports Windows and Linux operating systems, making it ideal for employees' remote working needs. Therefore, this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要测试一个新应用程序。哪项 AWS 原则将帮助公司测试应用程序？
question_text.en: A company wants to test a new application. Which AWS principle will help the company test the application?

A.zh: 做出长期承诺以换取成本折扣。
A.en: Make long-term commitments in exchange for a cost discount.

B.zh: 根据需要扩大或缩小规模，无需做出任何长期承诺。
B.en: Scale up and down when needed without any long-term commitments.

C.zh: 完全控制应用程序基础设施。
C.en: Have total control over the application infrastructure.

D.zh: 管理与云相关的所有维护任务。
D.en: Manage all of the maintenance tasks associated with the cloud.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：长期承诺会降低测试期间调整资源的灵活性，不适合风险较低的新应用程序测试。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: cup option. Long-term commitments are often associated with Reserved Instances, but this is not suitable for testing new applications because testing buckets require flexibility, and long-term commitments limit this flexibility.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 允许客户按需扩展或缩减资源且无需长期承诺，可用较低风险和成本快速测试新应用程序。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cup options are AWS's on-demand resource usage model allows users to dynamically adjust resource scale as needed without long-term commitment, making it ideal for testing new applications.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：完全控制基础设施不是测试新应用程序的关键优势；按需伸缩和避免长期承诺更符合要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: cup option. While AWS provides control over the infrastructure, the focus of testing new applications is on flexibility and cost optimization rather than full control of the infrastructure.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 托管服务可以减少维护工作，但客户仍需承担部分维护责任；这也不是题目所问的测试原则。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: cup option. AWS's managed services (such as RDS, Lambda, etc.) can reduce users' maintenance tasks, but this has nothing to do with the core need of testing new applications.

answer_text.zh: B. 根据需要扩大或缩小规模，无需做出任何长期承诺。
answer_text.en: B. Scale up and down when needed without any long-term commitments.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 允许客户按需扩展或缩减资源且无需长期承诺，可用较低风险和成本快速测试新应用程序。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cup options are AWS's on-demand resource usage model allows users to dynamically adjust resource scale as needed without long-term commitment, making it ideal for testing new applications.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司计划推出一个电子商务网站，其中包含许多产品目录图像。该公司希望将网站的运维成本控制在特定的预算范围内。公司应使用哪种 AWS 服务或工具来监控网站的持续成本？
question_text.en: A company plans to launch an ecommerce website that contains many images for a product catalog. The company wants to keep the cost of running the website within a specific budget. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to monitor the ongoing costs of the website?

A.zh: AWS Cost Explorer
A.en: AWS Cost Explorer

B.zh: AWS 开发工具包
B.en: AWS SDKs

C.zh: EC2 映像产生器
C.en: EC2 Image Builder

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Cost Explorer 是一款帮助用户查看和分析其 AWS 账户的成本和使用情况的工具。它非常适合监控和管理预算，特别是对于持续运行的服务（例如电子商务网站）。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Cost Explorer is a tool that helps users view and analyze the costs and usage of their AWS accounts. It's great for monitoring and managing budgets, especially for services that run continuously (such as e-commerce websites).

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 开发工具包是用于与 AWS 服务进行编程交互的开发工具包。它不用于成本监控。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS SDKs are development toolkits for programmatic interaction with AWS services. It is not used for cost monitoring.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EC2 Image Builder 用于自动创建和管理虚拟机映像，而不考虑成本监控。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: EC2 Image Builder is used to automate the creation and management of virtual machine images, regardless of cost monitoring.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudFormation 用于自动化资源部署和管理。虽然它可以间接影响成本，但它并不是专门的成本监控工具。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is used to automate resource deployment and management. Although it can indirectly affect costs, it is not a specialized cost monitoring tool.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (75%) C (25%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Cost Explorer 是一款帮助用户查看和分析其 AWS 账户的成本和使用情况的工具。它非常适合监控和管理预算，特别是对于持续运行的服务（例如电子商务网站）。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (75%) C (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Cost Explorer is a tool that helps users view and analyze the costs and usage of their AWS accounts. It's great for monitoring and managing budgets, especially for services that run continuously (such as e-commerce websites).

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Application Load Balancer 后面部署了多个公共应用程序。该公司希望提高应用程序的性能。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has deployed several public applications behind Application Load Balancers. The company wants to improve the performance of the applications. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
A.en: AWS Global Accelerator

B.zh: Amazon Connect
B.en: Amazon Connect

C.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
C.en: Amazon ElastiCache

D.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
D.en: Amazon CloudWatch

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项网络优化服务，可通过使用世界各地的边缘网络加速流量来提高应用程序性能和可用性。特别适合需要低延迟、高性能的应用场景。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is a network optimization service that improves application performance and availability by accelerating traffic using edge networks anywhere in the world. It is especially suitable for application scenarios that require low latency and high performance.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一项用于客户支持和联系中心场景的云联系中心服务，与应用程序性能优化无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service used in customer support and call center scenarios and has nothing to do with application performance optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ElastiCache 是一项内存缓存服务，用于加速数据库查询和应用程序数据存储，但它主要优化数据库性能而不是整体应用程序性能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon ElastiCache is an in-memory caching service used to accelerate database queries and application data storage, but it mainly optimizes database performance rather than overall application performance.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudWatch 是一项监控和日志记录服务，可追踪资源使用情况和性能指标，但它不会直接提高应用程序性能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudWatch is a monitoring and logging service that tracks resource usage and performance metrics, but it does not directly improve application performance.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 是一项网络优化服务，可通过使用世界各地的边缘网络加速流量来提高应用程序性能和可用性。特别适合需要低延迟、高性能的应用场景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is a network optimization service that improves application performance and availability by accelerating traffic using edge networks anywhere in the world. It is especially suitable for application scenarios that require low latency and high performance.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个本地应用程序。该应用程序的处理时间不到 5 分钟，并且每天仅调用几次。该公司希望将应用程序迁移到 AWS 云。哪种 AWS 服务能够以最具成本效益的方式支持该应用程序？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises application. The application has processing times of less than 5 minutes and is invoked only a few times each day. The company wants to move the application to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service will support this application MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)

D.zh: Amazon EC2
D.en: Amazon EC2

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ECS 是适合运行容器化应用程序的容器编排服务。虽然可以支持该应用，但对于调用频率较低的应用，ECS 可能会产生额外的管理和运行成本，因此不是最具成本效益的选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service suitable for running containerized applications. Although it can support this application, for applications with low frequency calls, ECS may incur additional management and running costs and therefore is not the most cost-effective option.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计费服务，根据使用情况计费。它非常适合处理低频、耗时的任务，因为用户只需为实际运行时间付费，不需要管理底层基础设施。这是最具成本效益的类固醇选择。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a serverless billing service that is billed based on usage. It is ideal for processing low-frequency, time-consuming tasks because users only pay for the actual execution time and do not need to manage the underlying infrastructure. This is the most cost-effective steroid option.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EKS 是一项托管 Kubernetes 服务，适合运行容器化应用程序。与ECS类似，需要额外的管理和运维成本，不适合调用频率较低的应用。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service suitable for running containerized applications. Similar to ECS, it requires additional management and operation costs and is not suitable for applications with low frequency calls.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EC2 提供虚拟机服务，用户需要为实例的运行时间付费。即使应用程序只运行几分钟，启动和运行EC2实例的成本仍然很高，因此不适合调用频率较低的应用程序。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: provides virtual machine services, and users need to pay for the running time of the instance. Even if the application program only runs for a few minutes, the cost of starting and running EC2 instances is still high, so it is not suitable for applications with low frequency calls.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计费服务，根据使用情况计费。它非常适合处理低频、耗时的任务，因为用户只需为实际运行时间付费，不需要管理底层基础设施。这是最具成本效益的类固醇选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a serverless billing service that is billed based on usage. It is ideal for processing low-frequency, time-consuming tasks because users only pay for the actual execution time and do not need to manage the underlying infrastructure. This is the most cost-effective steroid option.

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在了解 AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 的观点。 AWS CAF 的哪个角度涉及策略管理功能？
question_text.en: A company is learning about the perspectives of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF). Which perspective of the AWS CAF addresses the strategy management capability?

A.zh: 商业视角
A.en: Business perspective

B.zh: 人物视角
B.en: People perspective

C.zh: 治理视角
C.en: Governance perspective

D.zh: 运维视角
D.en: Operations perspective

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：业务观点着重于组织的业务目标和策略管理能力，包括如何通过云技术实现业务价值。它涉及策略规划、财务管理和业务目标的衔接，因此与问题中的「策略管理能力」直接相关。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Business Perspective focuses on an organization's business goals and strategic management capabilities, including how to achieve business value through cloud technology. It involves the alignment of strategic planning, financial management and business objectives and is therefore directly related to the “strategy management capability” in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：人员视角关注文化、组织结构、技能和人员转型；策略管理能力属于业务视角。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The People perspective focuses on culture, organizational structure, skills, and workforce transformation; strategy management belongs to the Business perspective.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：治理观点主要关注风险管理、合规性和政策制定，尽管与管理相关，但并不直接涉及策略管理能力。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Governance Perspective focuses primarily on risk management, compliance and policy development and, although related to management, does not directly address strategic management capabilities.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：运维观点主要关注运维效率与服务交付，与策略管理能力没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Operations Perspective focuses primarily on operational efficiency and service delivery and is not directly related to strategic management capabilities.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (50%) A (50%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：业务观点着重于组织的业务目标和策略管理能力，包括如何通过云技术实现业务价值。它涉及策略规划、财务管理和业务目标的衔接，因此与问题中的「策略管理能力」直接相关。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (50%) A (50%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Business Perspective focuses on an organization's business goals and strategic management capabilities, including how to achieve business value through cloud technology. It involves the alignment of strategic planning, financial management and business objectives and is therefore directly related to the “strategy management capability” in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望集成其联系中心，以改善客户与联系中心代理的语音和聊天体验。哪种 AWS 服务或工具可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to consolidate its call centers to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
A.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

B.zh: AWS 支持中心
B.en: AWS Support Center

C.zh: Amazon Cognito
C.en: Amazon Cognito

D.zh: Amazon Connect
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SNS 是用于发布和订阅消息的消息服务。虽然它可以发送通知，但它不具有联系中心的功能，因此此选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SNS is a messaging service for publishing and subscribing messages. While it can send notifications, it doesn't have the functionality of a call center, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 支持中心 是用来管理AWS支持请求的工具，与客户联系中心无关，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is the tool used to manage AWS support requests and has nothing to do with customer call centers, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Cognito 是一项用于用户身份验证和管理的服务，虽然它可以帮助管理用户，但它不提供联系中心功能，因此不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service for user authentication and management, and while it can help manage users, it does not provide call center functionality, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一项云联系中心服务，专门设计用于改善客户与联系中心代理的语音和聊天体验。该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a cloud call center service designed specifically to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. This option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Connect 是一项云联系中心服务，专门设计用于改善客户与联系中心代理的语音和聊天体验。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cloud call center service designed specifically to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在需要时配置不间断的 Amazon EC2 实例，并以秒数支付计算容量费用。哪种 EC2 实例购买选项可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to provision uninterruptible Amazon EC2 instances, when needed, and pay for compute capacity by the second. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 预留实例
A.en: Reserved Instances

B.zh: 竞价型实例
B.en: Spot Instances

C.zh: 按需型实例
C.en: On-Demand Instances

D.zh: 专用实例
D.en: Dedicated Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：预留实例是用户需要事先承诺使用一段时间（通常为1年或3年）的预留实例，不能按需启动或按秒计费。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Reserved Instances are reserved instances that users need to commit to using for a certain period of time in advance (usually 1 or 3 years) and cannot be started on demand or billed by the second.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：竞价实例是价格较低的竞价实例，但可能会因市场需求而中断，不适合需要不间断运行的场景。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Spot Instances are spot instances with lower prices, but may be interrupted due to market demand and are not suitable for scenarios that require uninterrupted operation.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：按需型实例允许用户按需启动实例并按秒计费，适合需要灵活性和不间断运行的场景。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances allow users to launch instances on demand and bill them by the second, which is suitable for scenarios that require flexibility and uninterrupted operation.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专用实例是在单租户硬件上运行的专用实例，主要用于满足合规性或隔离要求，但不强调按需启动或按秒计费。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Dedicated Instances are dedicated instances that run on single-tenant hardware and are mainly used to meet compliance or isolation requirements, but do not emphasize on-demand startup or per-second billing.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：按需型实例允许用户按需启动实例并按秒计费，适合需要灵活性和不间断运行的场景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances allow users to launch instances on demand and bill them by the second, which is suitable for scenarios that require flexibility and uninterrupted operation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务可以将 Amazon EC2 实例从一个 AWS 区域迁移到另一个 AWS 区域？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can migrate Amazon EC2 instances from one AWS Region to another?

A.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
A.en: AWS Application Migration Service

B.zh: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
B.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

C.zh: AWS DataSync
C.en: AWS DataSync

D.zh: AWS Migration Hub
D.en: AWS Migration Hub

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Application Migration Service 是一项专门用于将服务器（包括 Amazon EC2 实例）迁移到另一个 AWS 区域的服务。简化迁移流程，支持跨区域迁移。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Migration Service is a service specifically designed for migrating servers (including Amazon EC2 instances) to another AWS region. It simplifies the migration process and supports cross-region migration.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DMS 主要用于迁移数据库，而非 EC2 实例。不支持EC2实例的跨区域迁移。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DMS is mainly used to migrate databases, not EC2 instances. It does not support cross-region migration of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS DataSync 是一项用于迁移文件数据的服务，适用于文件系统之间的数据传输，而不是迁移 EC2 实例。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS DataSync is a service for migrating file data and is suitable for data transfer between file systems rather than migrating EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Migration Hub 是一个用于追踪和管理迁移项目进度的输入工具，但它本身并不会运行迁移任务，例如迁移 EC2 实例。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Migration Hub is an input tool used to track and manage the progress of migration projects, but it does not perform migration tasks itself, such as migrating EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Application Migration Service 是一项专门用于将服务器（包括 Amazon EC2 实例）迁移到另一个 AWS 区域的服务。简化迁移流程，支持跨区域迁移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Migration Service is a service specifically designed for migrating servers (including Amazon EC2 instances) to another AWS region. It simplifies the migration process and supports cross-region migration.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要阻止 SQL 注入攻击。哪些 AWS 服务或功能提供此功能？
question_text.en: A company needs to block SQL injection attacks. Which AWS service or feature provides this functionality?

A.zh: AWS WAF
A.en: AWS WAF

B.zh: 网络 ACL
B.en: Network ACLs

C.zh: 安全群组
C.en: Security groups

D.zh: AWS Trusted Advisor
D.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS WAF（Web 应用程序防火墙）是一项专门设计用于保护 Web 应用程序免受 SQL 注入和跨站点脚本攻击等常见攻击的服务。它允许用户定义规则来过滤流量。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS WAF (Web Application Firewall) is a service specifically designed to protect web applications from common attacks such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks. It allows users to define rules to filter traffic.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络ACL（网络访问控制清单）是一种用于在子网层级控制入站和出站流量的工具，但它无法侦测和阻止SQL注入攻击，因为它只处理IP地址和连接端口层级的规则。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Network ACLs (Network Access Control Lists) are a tool used to control inbound and outbound traffic at the subnet level, but it cannot detect and block SQL injection attacks because it only handles rules at the IP address and port level.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全群组是实例级防火墙，用于控制入站和出站流量，但它无法识别和阻止 SQL 注入攻击，因为它不处理用户层流量。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Security groups are instance-level firewalls used to control inbound and outbound traffic, but it cannot identify and block SQL injection attacks because it does not handle user layer traffic.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 是一种优化工具，用于检查账户安全性、成本效率等，但不提供实时攻击防护。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization tool used to check account security, cost efficiency, etc., but it does not provide real-time attack protection.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS WAF（Web 应用程序防火墙）是一项专门设计用于保护 Web 应用程序免受 SQL 注入和跨站点脚本攻击等常见攻击的服务。它允许用户定义规则来过滤流量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS WAF (Web Application Firewall) is a service specifically designed to protect web applications from common attacks such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks. It allows users to define rules to filter traffic.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行其应用程序。公司需要将应用程序保留在本地，以满足合规性要求。哪种 AWS 产品可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run its application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to keep the application on-premises to meet a compliance requirement. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 专用实例
A.en: Dedicated Instances

B.zh: Amazon CloudFront
B.en: Amazon CloudFront

C.zh: AWS Fargate
C.en: AWS Fargate

D.zh: AWS Outposts
D.en: AWS Outposts

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专用实例 是在单租户硬件上运行的 Amazon EC2 实例，提供物理隔离以满足某些合规性需求。然而，它们仍然运行在AWS云中，而不是本地，因此无法满足「将应用程序部署在本地」的要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: are Amazon EC2 instances running on single-tenant hardware that provide physical isolation to meet certain compliance needs. However, they still run in the AWS cloud, not on-premises, and thus fail to meet the requirement of "keeping applications deployed on-premises." This option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一种内容传递网络 (CDN) 服务，用于加速网站、视频和其他内容的分发。它与本地部署无关，并且不符合合规性要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a content delivery network (CDN) service used to accelerate the delivery of websites, videos, and other content. It is not relevant for on-premises deployments and does not meet compliance requirements. This option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Fargate 是一个用于运行容器化应用程序的无服务器计算引擎。完全托管在AWS云中，无法满足「应用程序部署在本地」的要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a serverless computing engine for running containerized applications. It is fully hosted in the AWS cloud and cannot meet the requirement of "keeping the application deployed on-premises". This option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Outposts 是一种混合云解决方案，可让客户在本地环境中运行 AWS 服务，同时保持与 AWS 云的集成。它专门设计用于满足需要本地部署的合规性要求。该选项符合题目要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a hybrid cloud solution that allows customers to run AWS services in an on-premises environment while maintaining integration with the AWS cloud. It is specifically designed to meet compliance requirements that require on-premises deployment. This option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Outposts 是一种混合云解决方案，可让客户在本地环境中运行 AWS 服务，同时保持与 AWS 云的集成。它专门设计用于满足需要本地部署的合规性要求。该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a hybrid cloud solution that allows customers to run AWS services in an on-premises environment while maintaining integration with the AWS cloud. It is specifically designed to meet compliance requirements that require on-premises deployment. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要连接其支持的 AWS 服务和 VPC。该公司不想将其内部流量暴露给公共互联网。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to connect its supported AWS services and VPCs. The company does not want to expose its internal traffic to the public internet. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon Inspector
A.en: Amazon Inspector

B.zh: AWS PrivateLink
B.en: AWS PrivateLink

C.zh: Amazon Connect
C.en: Amazon Connect

D.zh: 互联网网关
D.en: AWS Internet Gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项安全评估服务，用于检查应用程序是否存在安全漏洞和合规性问题。与需要连接VPC和服务无关，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a security assessment service that examines applications for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues. It has nothing to do with the need to connect the VPC and the service, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS PrivateLink 可让您通过专用网络连接 AWS 服务和 VPC，从而防止流量暴露至公用 Internet。这就是问题所要求的精确解，所以该选项符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: allows you to connect AWS services and VPCs over a private network, preventing traffic from being exposed to the public Internet. This is the exact solution required by the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是一个用于建构云联系中心的服务，与连接VPC和服务的需求无关，因此Amazon Connect 是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a service for building cloud contact centers and has nothing to do with the need to connect VPCs and services, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：互联网网关 用于将VPC连接到公共互联网，问题明确要求防止流量暴露到公共互联网，因此互联网网关 是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is used to connect VPC to the public Internet, and the question clearly requires preventing traffic from being exposed to the public Internet, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS PrivateLink 可让您通过专用网络连接 AWS 服务和 VPC，从而防止流量暴露至公用 Internet。这就是问题所要求的精确解，所以该选项符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: allows you to connect AWS services and VPCs over a private network, preventing traffic from being exposed to the public Internet. This is the exact solution required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服务可以使用政策管理 AWS 资源的权限？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can manage permissions for AWS resources by using policies?

A.zh: Amazon Inspector
A.en: Amazon Inspector

B.zh: Amazon Detective
B.en: Amazon Detective

C.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

D.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
D.en: Amazon GuardDuty

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Inspector 是一项安全评估服务，用于检查应用程序是否有安全漏洞以及是否不符合最佳实践。它不负责管理权限。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is a security assessment service that examines applications for security vulnerabilities and noncompliance with best practices. It is not responsible for administrative permissions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Detective 是一项安全分析服务，用于帮助调查和识别潜在的安全问题。不涉及权限管理。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon Detective is a security analysis service used to help investigate and identify potential security issues. It does not involve permission management.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：IAM 是AWS的核心服务之一，用于管理用户、群组和角色的权限。通过策略（Policies），IAM可以精确控制对AWS资源的访问。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: IAM is one of the core services of AWS and is used to manage the permissions of users, groups, and roles. Through policies (Policies), IAM can precisely control access to AWS resources.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一种威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的安全威胁。它不负责权限管理。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security threats. It is not responsible for permission management.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
answer_text.en: C. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：IAM 是AWS的核心服务之一，用于管理用户、群组和角色的权限。通过策略（Policies），IAM可以精确控制对AWS资源的访问。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM is one of the core services of AWS and is used to manage the permissions of users, groups, and roles. Through policies (Policies), IAM can precisely control access to AWS resources.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在 AWS 云中运行部分工作负载。由于合规原因，该公司需要将部分工作负载保留在自己的现场数据中心。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to run some of its workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to keep some of the workload in its own on- site data center due to compliance reasons. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWSConfig
A.en: AWSConfig

B.zh: AWS Outposts
B.en: AWS Outposts

C.zh: Amazon Lightsail
C.en: Amazon Lightsail

D.zh: Amazon Connect
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Config 是用于记录和审核 AWS 资源配置的服务，主要用于合规性检查和资源变更管理。它不提供混合云解决方案，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Config is a service for recording and auditing AWS resource configurations, mainly used for compliance checking and resource change management. It does not provide a hybrid cloud solution, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Outposts 将 AWS 基础设施和服务部署到客户的本地数据中心，允许与 AWS 云集成，同时保持合规工作负载在本地运行。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts deploy AWS infrastructure and services to customers' on-premises data centers, allowing integration with the AWS cloud while keeping compliant workloads running locally.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Lightsail 是适用于小型应用程序和开发环境的简化虚拟服务器解决方案。它不支持混合云场景，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a simplified virtual server solution for small applications and development environments. It does not support hybrid cloud scenarios, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Connect 是云联系中心服务，主要应用于客服场景，与混合云无关，因此不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a cloud contact center service mainly used in customer service scenarios and has nothing to do with hybrid cloud, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Outposts 将 AWS 基础设施和服务部署到客户的本地数据中心，允许与 AWS 云集成，同时保持合规工作负载在本地运行。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts deploy AWS infrastructure and services to customers' on-premises data centers, allowing integration with the AWS cloud while keeping compliant workloads running locally.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要部署一个在关系数据库中存储数据的应用程序。该公司希望由 AWS 管理自动备份和数据库快照等数据库任务。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy an application that stores data in a relational database. The company wants database tasks, such as automated backups and database snapshots, to be managed by AWS. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon DocumentDB
A.en: Amazon DocumentDB

B.zh: Amazon RDS
B.en: Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

D.zh: Amazon S3
D.en: Amazon S3

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DocumentDB 是专门用于处理JSON数据的文档数据库服务，适用于非关系型数据库场景。本题需要关系型数据库，因此不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is a document database service specifically designed to process JSON data and is suitable for non-relational database scenarios. The question requires a relational database, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon RDS 是一种托管关系型数据库服务，支持自动化管理功能（如备份、快照、监控等）。符合题目要求，故因此符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: is a managed relational database service that supports automated management functions (such as backups, snapshots, monitoring, etc.). It meets the question requirements, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EBS 是一种块存储服务，通常用于为 EC2 实例提供存储支持。它不具备关系数据库的管理能力，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is a block storage service commonly used to provide storage support for EC2 instances. It does not have the management capabilities of a relational database, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一种对象存储服务，适合存储非结构化数据（例如文件、图像等）。它不支持关系型数据库功能，所以该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: is an object storage service suitable for storing unstructured data (such as files, images, etc.). It does not support relational database functionality, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (67%) C (33%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon RDS 是一种托管关系型数据库服务，支持自动化管理功能（如备份、快照、监控等）。符合题目要求，故因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (67%) C (33%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a managed relational database service that supports automated management functions (such as backups, snapshots, monitoring, etc.). It meets the question requirements, so this option is.

question_text.zh: 一家经营本地服务器的公司决定开展新业务。该公司确定新的工作负载需要额外的服务器。云计算的哪些优势可以帮助公司尽快配置额外的基础设施？
question_text.en: A company that operates on-premises servers decides to start a new line of business. The company determines that additional servers are required for the new workloads. Which advantage of cloud computing can help the company to provision additional infrastructure as quickly as possible?

A.zh: 受惠于大规模规模经济
A.en: Benefit from massive economies of scale

B.zh: 提高速度与敏捷性
B.en: Increase speed and agility

C.zh: 将固定费用换成可变费用
C.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense

D.zh: 几分钟内走向全球
D.en: Go global in minutes

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：规模经济的主要优势是降低成本；这个问题需要快速配置额外的基础设施，以适应云计算带来的速度和敏捷性。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The main advantage of economies of scale is cost reduction; the question requires the rapid provisioning of additional infrastructure, corresponding to the speed and agility brought by cloud computing.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：云计算的主要优势之一是能够快速部署资源，让企业能够快速响应业务需求。这正是问题中的公司所需要的能力。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: One of the main advantages of cloud computing is the ability to quickly deploy resources, allowing enterprises to quickly respond to business needs. This is exactly the capability the company in the question needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这个选项描述了云计算的另一个优点，即成本模型的弹性，但与快速部署额外的基础设施无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option describes another advantage of cloud computing, which is the flexibility of the cost model, but not related to the rapid deployment of additional infrastructure.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这个选项描述了云计算支持全球化的能力，但问题没有提及全球化的必要性，而是重点放在额外基础设施的快速部署。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option describes the ability of cloud computing to support globalization, but the question does not mention the need for globalization, but focuses on the rapid deployment of additional infrastructure.

answer_text.zh: B. 提高速度与敏捷性

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：云计算的主要优势之一是能够快速部署资源，让企业能够快速响应业务需求。这正是问题中的公司所需要的能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: One of the main advantages of cloud computing is the ability to quickly deploy resources, allowing enterprises to quickly respond to business needs. This is exactly the capability the company in the question needs.
